Team: Restraint.description: When an operator applies Vulnerability or Arts Infliction stacks, DMG Dealt (of the corresponding type) by the said operator -45% - -90% for 10s.

Team: Decapitate.description: DMG Taken by the controlled operator +50% - +100%

Ambient: Withering.description: Only 1 Healing Mass is generated between waves. / No Healing Masses are generated between waves.

Team: Bent Edges.description: Whenever an operator casts an ultimate, Ultimate DMG Dealt by the said operator's subsequent ultimates -50% - -100%.

Edit: Effect Barrier.description: Vulnerability or Arts Infliction of the same element can only be applied to the same enemy once every 5s.

Edit: Rush.description: Enemy movement speed +100%. Enemies also do not suffer more than 25% Max HP of DMG within 0.1s.

Team: Encumbered.description: Natural SP Recovery is temporarily paused when the controlled Operator has not dealt a Final Strike to the enemy for 12 seconds.

Ambient: Synced Growth.description: Whenever the controlled operator is restored for 10% Max HP or acquires a shield with 20% Max HP, every enemy in the battlefield is also restored for 8% Max HP.

Team: Whittle Down.description: When operators take DMG, part of that DMG will be converted to Max HP Reduction. Conversion rates: 30% (for melee operators) / 50% (for ranged operators).

Ambient: Overclock.description: Length of Operator Combo Skill Cooldown -60%; Battle Skill DMG Dealt -60%

Ambient: Tremor.description: Operators' DMG Dealt +100% for any DMG not dealt by Basic Attack, Battle Skill, Combo Skill, or Ultimate. Battle Skill DMG Dealt -60%.

Edit: Encasement.description: For each Vulnerability or Arts Infliction stack that an enemy has, the said enemy receives DMG Taken (of the corresponding type) -10%. This effect is removed 0.1s after the Vulnerability or Arts Infliction ends.

Ambient: Partition.description: Cannot switch controlled operator once battle begins.

Edit: Toxic Residue.description: A defeated enemy will leave a patch of toxins on the battlefield. Operators caught within the patch take 2% - 5% Max HP of DMG per second.

Team: Battle Chill.description: Whenever operators cast battle skill 1 - 2 times, apply 1 stack of Cryo Infliction to the controlled operator. Effect trigger cooldown for each operator: 3s.

Team: Heat Loss.description: Whenever operators cast combo skill 1 - 2 times, apply 1 stack of Cryo Infliction to the controlled operator. Effect trigger cooldown for each operator: 3s.

Edit: Flashfreeze.description: If an enemy applies Cryo Infliction to the controlled Operator, directly convert the effect to Solidification instead.

Ambient: Thermolysis.description: Duration of Solidification applied to the controlled operator is extended to 15s. Casting Heat-type skills can dispel the Solidification.

Ambient: Biolysis.description: Duration of Solidification applied to the controlled operator is extended to 15s. Casting Nature-type skills can dispel the Solidification.

Ambient: Electrolysis.description: Duration of Solidification applied to the controlled operator is extended to 15s. Casting Electric-type skills can dispel the Solidification.

Ambient: Physicolysis.description: Duration of Solidification applied to the controlled operator is extended to 15s. Casting Physical-type skills can dispel the Solidification.

Edit: Regeneration.description: An enemy under crowd control effects regenerates 5% - 15% Max HP per second.

Ambient: RE-Construct.description: Heavy Ram and Heavy Sting enemies in the fourth wave / third and fourth wave are replaced by Heavy Ram α and Heavy Sting α.
